name: Paychex
analysis: PAYX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 33% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry $97.9900, stop $94.8519, target $112.4395 (4.60:1) — then trail it.
